name: @spike/stream-pack
description: A SYNTHETIC stream/blob extension PACK (the platform's own forcing-function for the extensions[] mechanism). A @spike/* package so the CI `--filter='!@spike/*'` excludes it; a workspace member only so pnpm links @rayspec/platform (the pack ENTRY imports defineExtension from it) — mirroring how a real pack ships in its own repo with the platform as a dependency. NO build/typecheck/test: it is loaded at deploy/test time by loadExtensions (the importer transforms the .ts).
